name: GJB 5621A Oracle数据库安全基线
description: 符合GJB 5621A-2017军用软件安全需求分析指南的Oracle数据库安全基线检查

rules.name: 保密性-密码加密存储
rules.description: 检查密码是否使用强加密算法
rules.sql: SELECT limit FROM dba_profiles WHERE resource_name='PASSWORD_VERIFY_FUNCTION' AND profile='DEFAULT';

rules.name: 保密性-数据传输加密
rules.description: 检查网络加密配置
rules.sql: SELECT value FROM v$parameter WHERE name='sqlnet.encryption_client';

rules.name: 保密性-透明数据加密
rules.description: 检查是否启用TDE透明数据加密
rules.sql: SELECT * FROM v$encrypt(ed_tablespace);

rules.name: 完整性-审计功能开启
rules.description: 检查是否开启审计功能
rules.sql: SHOW PARAMETER audit_trail;

rules.name: 完整性-数据库校验和
rules.description: 检查数据块校验和配置
rules.sql: SHOW PARAMETER db_block_checksum;

rules.name: 完整性-归档模式
rules.description: 检查是否启用归档模式
rules.sql: SELECT log_mode FROM v$database;

rules.name: 可用性-最大会话数
rules.description: 检查最大会话数配置
rules.sql: SHOW PARAMETER sessions;

rules.name: 可用性-最大进程数
rules.description: 检查最大进程数配置
rules.sql: SHOW PARAMETER processes;

rules.name: 抗抵赖性-细粒度审计
rules.description: 检查是否启用细粒度审计
rules.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dba_audit_policies;

rules.name: 抗抵赖性-统一审计
rules.description: 检查统一审计状态
rules.sql: SELECT value FROM v$option WHERE parameter='Unified Auditing';

rules.name: 身份鉴别-密码复杂度
rules.description: 检查密码复杂度策略
rules.sql: SELECT resource_name, limit FROM dba_profiles WHERE profile='DEFAULT' AND resource_name LIKE 'PASSWORD%';

rules.name: 身份鉴别-密码有效期
rules.description: 检查密码有效期配置
rules.sql: SELECT limit FROM dba_profiles WHERE profile='DEFAULT' AND resource_name='PASSWORD_LIFE_TIME';

rules.name: 身份鉴别-登录失败锁定
rules.description: 检查登录失败锁定配置
rules.sql: SELECT limit FROM dba_profiles WHERE profile='DEFAULT' AND resource_name='FAILED_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS';

rules.name: 访问控制-默认账户锁定
rules.description: 检查默认账户是否锁定
rules.sql: SELECT username FROM dba_users WHERE username IN ('SCOTT','HR','OE','PM','IX','SH','BI') AND account_status='OPEN';

rules.name: 访问控制-DBA权限用户
rules.description: 检查具有DBA权限的用户数量
rules.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM dba_role_privs WHERE granted_role='DBA';

rules.name: 访问控制-PUBLIC角色权限
rules.description: 检查PUBLIC角色的危险权限
rules.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM dba_tab_privs WHERE grantee='PUBLIC' AND privilege IN ('EXECUTE','SELECT','UPDATE','DELETE');

rules.name: 安全审计-审计日志保留
rules.description: 检查审计日志保留策略
rules.sql: SELECT value FROM v$parameter WHERE name='audit_file_dest';

rules.name: 安全审计-特权操作审计
rules.description: 检查是否审计特权操作
rules.sql: SELECT name FROM system_privilege_map;

rules.name: 网络安全-监听密码
rules.description: 检查监听器是否配置密码

rules.name: 网络安全-监听日志
rules.description: 检查监听日志配置

rules.name: 数据安全-控制文件多路复用
rules.description: 检查控制文件是否多路复用
rules.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM v$controlfile;

rules.name: 数据安全-重做日志多路复用
rules.description: 检查重做日志是否多路复用
rules.sql: SELECT group#, count(*) FROM v$logfile GROUP BY group# HAVING count(*) >= 2;

rules.name: 备份恢复-闪回区配置
rules.description: 检查闪回区是否配置
rules.sql: SHOW PARAMETER db_recovery_file_dest;

rules.name: 备份恢复-RMAN备份检查
rules.description: 检查RMAN备份情况
rules.sql: SELECT start_time, status FROM v$rman_status WHERE start_time > SYSDATE-7;

rules.name: 资源控制-配置文件限制
rules.description: 检查资源配置限制
rules.sql: SELECT resource_name, limit FROM dba_profiles WHERE profile='DEFAULT' AND resource_type='KERNEL';
